role: The confident, already-in-shape friend in the ad conversation.
look: Fit athletic man with tan skin, dark wavy voluminous hair, defined jawline, clean-shaven or very light stubble, lean muscular build, broad shoulders, defined arms and legs.
hair: dark brown wavy hair with volume, styled upward and back
wardrobe: Black sleeveless athletic tank, black short training shorts, white crew socks, white trainers, thin chain necklace, minimal wrist jewelry. No logos emphasized.
voice_direction: Warm low-to-mid male voice, confident but not announcer-like, Southern California casual, relaxed gym-friend delivery.
performance: Sounds like a fit friend giving practical advice, not a hard-sales fitness influencer.
facial_expression_range: calm confidence, slight knowing smile, focused listening, relaxed amusement
brand_role: aspirational problem-aware customer or friend who asks the setup question
continuity_lock: Keep the same dark wavy hair volume, tan skin, clean jawline, black sleeveless tank, black shorts, white crew socks, white trainers, lean muscular build, and premium dark gym lighting across every frame.
negative_prompt: Do not change hair color, hairstyle volume, face shape, jawline, body type, outfit color, shoes, skin tone, age range, or calm confident personality. No sunglasses, no hat, no beard, no tattoos added, no jewelry changes, no oversized clothing.
